email.title: Email
email.description: Pass the verified email (loggedInEmail or OTP-verified).

subscriptionId.title: Subscription Id
subscriptionId.description: Optional; if omitted the shopper's latest active subscription is used.

verifiedEmail.title: Verified Email
verifiedEmail.description: Pass loggedInEmail when signed in, or the OTP-verified proof. The action returns NOTHING without this.
